title: melochia polystachya
intro: Melochia polystachya, also known as the 'small neem', is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Melochiaceae. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Melochia polystachya has been used to treat various health conditions, offering benefits such as reducing fever, aiding in digestion, and alleviating skin irritations. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, which are often applied to soothe skin issues and promote overall well-being.
